name: SQL Query
description: Structure of a SQL query object as used in database API integrations

fields.name: sql
fields.description: The SQL statement to execute (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL)

fields.name: parameters
fields.description: Ordered positional parameters for ? or $1 style parameterized queries

fields.name: namedParameters
fields.description: Named parameters for :name or @name style parameterized queries

fields.name: maxRows
fields.description: Maximum rows to return (acts as LIMIT if not specified in SQL)

fields.name: database
fields.description: Target database/schema name for multi-database connections
